name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I'm speechless
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | I just hung up after talking to my finance team. I have to say, I'm completely blown away by what we accomplished this month. **It was close, but thanks to your generosity, we managed to surpass our FEC goal.** We set an ambitious goal for the first quarter of 2018 -- and the stakes couldn't have been any higher. It's an election year, and the National Republican Senatorial Committee is already running ads against me. Special interest groups are zeroing in on Ohio. We needed to be able to report strong numbers to the FEC. We needed our grassroots supporters to deliver. You did, and I'm so grateful. I promise I'm fighting like hell to win this race. I'm determined to make sure Ohio families continue to have someone who will fight for them in Washington. Let's keep this momentum going. Every goal we hit will help us spread our message, climb in the polls, and overcome special interest spending. | | | [Donate](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb99/4462dc26/4120aaca/20004b4f/2335259280/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180402?refcode=sbe180402_m")
---
Thank you again for all your hard work,
Sherrod

name: The White House
subject: ‘Catch and release,’ explained
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7a22645549519ca76ba2b781f7fe4c569c5006816f88c6296904a605e87718c85e100c93e77b2a00115de9d883a7fd368f51026bf6fb8520

‘Catch and release,’ explained

“A huge caravan of Central Americans is headed for the U.S., and no one in Mexico dares to stop them,” BuzzFeed News reported on Friday. A number of the caravan’s participants have said they intend to cross the U.S. border illegally once they get here, hoping to slip by American authorities undetected.

An immigration system that gives everyone a fair chance—including both newcomers and longstanding American citizens—requires respect for our Nation’s laws. Yet catch-and-release loopholes, which are the result of statutory and judicial obstacles, encourage illegal immigration and prevent the removal of these individuals once they arrive. That lawlessness helps no one.

President Donald J. Trump has called upon Congress to enact comprehensive reform that addresses this breakdown in the system. In the absence of lasting solutions, we can only expect the flow of illegal immigration into our country to continue in the years ahead.

Read more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7a22645549519ca78ab14907eaa6265552503fd3bd0816a8ba6021f74ae5ffff8cc89e9a25c34a581d622b5b1e00253b77e2fa3c779b451b
What you need to know about ‘catch and release’

Meet Larry Kudlow

President Trump met with senior staff of his National Economic Council yesterday, welcoming new NEC Director Larry Kudlow to the White House. Kudlow is a respected commentator on economic and financial issues, and his vast experience includes a stint of public service in the Reagan Administration.

With Kudlow as a part of his team, “Our Country will have many years of Great Economic & Financial Success, with low taxes, unparalleled innovation, fair trade and an ever expanding labor force leading the way!” President Trump tweeted last month.

The economy is booming under the President’s agenda. Nearly 3 million jobs have been created since Election Day 2016, and more than 4 million American workers have seen a pay raise, bonus, or other benefit from tax cuts. With Kudlow onboard, America’s economic future looks even brighter.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7a22645549519ca74391ab45923905ae9e3c81cac7b9937a27bb9413c4dffb3fdb6f5804f063891a1773e0f74cd1276c16646cfdecb85169
Read more about President Trump’s meeting with Larry Kudlow.

Highlights from the 140th Easter Egg Roll

President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump hosted the 140th edition of the White House Easter Egg Roll yesterday, with thousands of families swarming the South Lawn for live music, children’s book readings, and other Easter-themed fun.

“Thank you all for being here, folks,” President Trump told an early group of visitors. “It’s an honor to have everybody. On behalf of the Trump family, many of whom are with us right here in the audience, I just want to thank you. This is a special year. Our country is doing great.”

The President thanked the White House Historical Association, the First Lady, and teams of volunteers who did “an incredible job” putting on the event and preserving the sacred White House grounds for all to enjoy.

Watch:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7a22645549519ca7055933637a0623fc72c7fa8ae23514b6a91b24ae75c33302985e0e1627ec58b9243f5d4ef0192f1b53e9385975221417
President Trump and the First Lady host the 140th Easter Egg Roll
More:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7a22645549519ca71e630fdec461a44be7d74bf2aaf1d1061364e6e70be2169e9a401ac2b18917b3a6131e161526d7a8e8ac8e26ad3fd40f
Photos from this year’s Easter Egg Roll
Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump at the 140th White House Easter Egg Roll | April 2, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS TODAY

Today, following an intelligence briefing, President Trump will meet with the Baltic States Heads of Government. The leaders will then participate in a working lunch and later hold a joint press conference.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7a22645549519ca73f6b40d5d001171f6d30b6710b19a9bed2eb87990bbeeef496a979a7eef30f1ea3580d8db21358306a8c10c171243e63

subject: Enough is enough: Fire Scott Pruitt
body:
Time is running out to oppose the Trump administration’s offshore drilling scheme.

(https://act.nrdc.org/letter/national-monuments-mj-180209?source=DEMMONPET&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=logo&utm_campaign=email) (https://act.nrdc.org/letter/fire-pruitt-180321?source=DEAPRUPET0418&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=logo&utm_campaign=email)

DONATE

Attacking our air, our water, and now our kids' health: Scott Pruitt is unfit to lead the EPA.

(https://act.nrdc.org/letter/fire-pruitt-180321?source=DEAPRUPET0418&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=actr&utm_campaign=email)

Enough is enough. Tell President Trump and Congress that Pruitt must be fired immediately.

TAKE ACTION

Dear Activist:

EPA chief Scott Pruitt supports bone-deep budget cuts to programs that protect us from dangerous air pollution, drinking water contamination, lead exposure, global warming impacts, and more. Pruitt won't spend to safeguard our environment — but when it comes to pampering himself, Pruitt wastes your tax money freely.

Private and military flights that cost taxpayers more than $58,000. $43,000 for a soundproof booth in his office so no one can hear his calls with (fossil fuel executives, perhaps?). $2 million annually for an unprecedented 24/7 security detail with 30 bodyguards.

It's time to say enough is enough. NRDC is taking a stand against Pruitt's dangerous mismanagement of our most important environmental agency — and we need you to stand with us to send a message that Washington can't ignore.

Tell President Trump and Congress: We demand better. Scott Pruitt must be fired as EPA Administrator! >> (https://act.nrdc.org/letter/fire-pruitt-180321?source=DEAPRUPET0418&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=text1&utm_campaign=email)

The EPA's mission is to protect human health and the environment — but Pruitt has his own agenda to prioritize pro-polluter policies above all else. Since day one of his tenure, Pruitt's done everything in his power to:

Shred environmental protections like the lifesaving Clean Power Plan and Clean Water Rule. Pruitt even rejected a ban on a nerve gas pesticide that causes neurological damage in children — meaning that the chemical is still being spread on food crops that wind up on our dinner plates. Fire Pruitt >> (https://act.nrdc.org/letter/fire-pruitt-180321?source=DEAPRUPET0418&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=text1&utm_campaign=email) Strangle the EPA's budget by supporting a plan to gut the agency's funding by 24%. This would all but eliminate essential programs that protect us from dangerous air pollution, oil spills, cancer-causing radiation, and more. Fire Pruitt >> (https://act.nrdc.org/letter/fire-pruitt-180321?source=DEAPRUPET0418&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=text1&utm_campaign=email) Put polluters in charge of the EPA by turning over key policy positions to well-connected insiders from the chemical, coal, oil, and natural gas industries. Fire Pruitt >> (https://act.nrdc.org/letter/fire-pruitt-180321?source=DEAPRUPET0418&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=text1&utm_campaign=email) Stamp out science by suppressing evidence that makes the case for protecting our health and environment — including stopping some of the EPA's own scientists from publicly addressing the dangers of climate change. Fire Pruitt >> (https://act.nrdc.org/letter/fire-pruitt-180321?source=DEAPRUPET0418&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=text1&utm_campaign=email) Destroy public confidence in the EPA by treating the agency as his own personal fiefdom, while wasting taxpayer dollars on lavish personal extravagances. This unethical and possibly illegal behavior has made him the target of multiple government investigations. Fire Pruitt >> (https://act.nrdc.org/letter/fire-pruitt-180321?source=DEAPRUPET0418&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=text1&utm_campaign=email)
Most employees couldn't keep their jobs with a resume like that — and Scott Pruitt shouldn't be any different.

Tell President Trump and Congress that Pruitt is unfit to lead the EPA, and should be fired immediately >> (https://act.nrdc.org/letter/fire-pruitt-180321?source=DEAPRUPET0418&utm_source=alert&utm_medium=text1&utm_campaign=email)

Thanks for speaking out today. I'll be in touch soon with more ways for you to stand up against Pruitt and his destructive agenda.

Sincerely,

Rhea Suh
President, NRDC

The mission of the Natural Resources Defense Council (NRDC) is to safeguard the Earth: its people, its plants and animals, and the natural systems on which all life depends. We combine the power of three million members and online activists with the expertise of some 500 scientists, lawyers, and policy advocates across the globe to ensure the rights of all people to the air, the water, and the wild.
If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link:
http://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMjU4LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjAzNDg1MjAy

Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

Dear Friend,

I am running for Congress in the 5th Congressional District of Pennsylvania and I need your help.

My goal is to be the leading voice for environmental protection in Washington.

I served for 24 years as a member of the Pennsylvania House Environmental Resource and Energy Committee -- four as Democratic Chairman -- working side by side with Katie McGinty when she was Secretary of the Pennsylvania Department of Environmental Protection.

**I was the first to introduce climate legislation in Pennsylvania and considered by many to be the state 's leading environmental legislator.**

Climate change is the greatest long-term threat to the world. I cannot sit idly by while Congress continues to ignore it.

Help me get to Washington so I can be a fierce advocate for our environment.

Greg Vitali

We can use those funds to improve our roads, bridges, broadband access, water, waste, and power projects throughout the district – making a real difference and improving the quality of life for Hoosiers. Having lived in the Sixth District for nearly sixty years, I will focus my congressional campaign on the issues that are critical to improving the quality of life for Hoosiers. The Primary is only 5 weeks away. Team Pence is working hard -- be on the lookout for my NEW ad on TV! I’m Ready To Serve, Again! Greg Pence | | | Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress | | PO Box 275 Taylorsville, IN 47280 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

[ ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff0b/767134fb/5ca66aaf/433825b0/315353522/VEsH/ "http://www.donnaforprincegeorges.org/")

| | Friend, I wanted to make sure you had the opportunity to sign Donna's [petition](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff0b/767134fb/5ca66aaf/433825b1/315353522/VEsE/ "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/give-the-community-of-prince-georges-county-a-voice-in-our-schools") to restore our County's elected school board. Donna is deeply committed to ensuring that our youth have access to quality education, and that includes putting the selection of our school board in the hands of voters. Please read Donna's message below, and**[I hope you can add your voice to our petition.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff0b/767134fb/5ca66aaf/433825b1/315353522/VEsF/ "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/give-the-community-of-prince-georges-county-a-voice-in-our-schools")** -Rahsheim \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Donna Edwards <[donna@donnaforprincegeorges.org](mailto:donna@donnaforprincegeorges.org)>
Date: Fri, Mar 30, 2018 at 11:58 AM
Subject: [sample] The community deserves a voice
To: <[lcw215@gmail.com](mailto:lcw215@gmail.com)> Hi Friend, Five years ago, our rights as county citizens were undermined when our County Public School Board was taken over by unelected, hand-picked appointees who then gave power to the CEO to make final policy decisions without board approval. We see the tragic results of this kind of insider politics in our schools every day, where scandal after scandal is tolerated while student performance plummets. We're losing our best teachers to neighboring school systems, and our children suffer the consequences. What's worse than the scandals are the cover-ups, which are facilitated by a corrupt system where school system leaders make political contributions to the folks who oversee their hiring decisions -- a clear violation of the people's trust. It is time to restore our elected school board and make our school leaders accountable to the citizens they're supposed to serve. There is a bill in the Maryland State House that would help our County do just that. **[Will you sign my petition to help push this bill through the Maryland State House?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff0b/767134fb/5ca66aaf/433825ce/315353522/VEsC/ "http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/-74fefdaa/-7673ca51/5d7858dc/433829b7/793787327/VEsE/") ** As a candidate for Prince George's County Executive, I do not accept money from big developers because voters deserve to know without any doubt that their County Executive will always look out for the citizens' best interest. We should expect no less from those who we entrust with our most precious resource - the potential of our children.**[Join me, and sign the petition so we can hold our county school leadership accountable.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff0b/767134fb/5ca66aaf/433825cf/315353522/VEsD/ "http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/-74fefdaa/-7673ca51/5d7858dc/433829b7/793787327/VEsF/")** Thank you for all of your support and all you do. Together, we will reform our public school system, end the pay-to-play corruption, and provide first-class educational opportunities for the children of Prince George's County. -Donna

---

---

name: Jay Inslee
subject: These outrageous rigged maps have to stop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Republican gerrymandering is out of control. | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79e3b/2f5ea88d/72a966ac/2cbcbc2e/4004163564/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/endgerrymanderingnow/?code=Inslee&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fgerrymandering-petition-thankyou") Friend, Here's a top reason why we need to win governorships in 2018: Every 10 years, after the official Census takes place, new population counts are used to redraw Congressional and state legislative districts. In some states like Washington, an independent or bipartisan committee steps in to draw the new maps. But in a lot of states, the state legislature creates the new districts. **And governors have veto power.** We've seen what happens when Republican states draw the maps. They have systematically carved out pockets of people grouped by ideology or race in order to reduce the power of their votes. They've disenfranchised whole populations and attacked the democratic process. They've rigged the maps in their favor across the country. It's locking Democrats out of office and drowning out the voices of their constituents. [**It's never been more important to stand up to the GOP's outrageous rigged maps. That's why I've joined with progressive leaders and organizations across America to stop Republican gerrymandering. If you agree, sign our petition now!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79e3b/2f5ea88d/72a966ac/2cbcbc2e/4004163564/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/endgerrymanderingnow/?code=Inslee&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fgerrymandering-petition-thankyou") The good news is: We can stop GOP gerrymandering by electing more Democratic governors. Gerrymandered districts are disastrous for fair elections. I'm working to elect Democratic governors across the country because we have a once-in-a-decade chance to fix the map and end GOP gerrymandering. But we can't do it without you. [**Sign on with us now to stop Republican gerrymandering. Sign on to support Democratic governors, independent commissions, and fair elections. It's time to fix the map.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79e3b/2f5ea88d/72a966ac/2cbcbc2e/4004163564/VEsF/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/endgerrymanderingnow/?code=Inslee&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fgerrymandering-petition-thankyou") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [SIGN ON »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79e3b/2f5ea88d/72a966ac/2cbcbc2e/4004163564/VEsC/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/endgerrymanderingnow/?code=Inslee&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fgerrymandering-petition-thankyou")

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Friend,

Last week, I faced my most important Federal Election Commission deadline. I'm happy to report we hit our goal thanks to grassroots supporters like you, but I want to make sure you also know about the latest progress I've accomplished in the Senate.

First, as part of the omnibus spending bill passed last month, **we were able to guarantee nearly $400 million to make election security improvements** before this year's midterm elections. I've been working across the aisle since December to secure more protections for the upcoming elections, and I'm thankful the rest of Congress agreed such action was a priority. We must be able to hold our elections without fear of cyberattacks or manipulation.

Second, we made progress on gun violence prevention. One of the first hurdles in addressing gun violence was the Dickey Amendment, a provision that banned the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention from studying the effects of gun violence and advocating for solutions to this national crisis. **This latest spending bill makes clear the CDC can study gun violence.** I am still fighting for repeal of the Dickey amendment, but this is an important first step.

Democrats also scored other major wins. We doubled the amount of funding for child care for low-income working families, increased Head Start funding by more than $610 million, and rejected the Trump administration's attempt to gut the EPA's budget.

While President Trump and his administration continue pushing dangerous policies, these developments are positive steps in the right direction. I'm proud of my Senate colleagues who fought for these and other necessary programs.

**Now, I 'll be traveling throughout New Mexico this week to meet with** **people like you. I hope I 'll get a chance to see you and discuss ways we can move New Mexico forward.** In the meantime, here's one photo from our campaign I just had to share -- make sure to follow my campaign on social media for more updates from our team!

[](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b882/43d8135f/61858fb8/51035bae/2372247557/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/TeamHeinrich/photos/a.142076185864553.35562.137363449669160/1906271409445013/?type=3&theater&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_180DO_180403_1_1&source=MH_EM_EN_180DO_180403_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_EN_180DO_180403_1_1")
_Bailey has been hard at work making sure our campaign
is not just people-powered, but pet-powered!_
Thank you again for your support.
Martin

"https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-support-today?amount=27&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Contribute&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_180DO_180403_1_1&source=MH_EM_EN_180DO_180403_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_EN_180DO_180403_1_1")**
P.S. I launched a new series - Moment with Martin - on Medium. [**Check it out here!**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b882/43d8135f/61858fb8/51035bd2/2372247557/VEsD/ "https://medium.com/@teamheinrich?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Check+it+out+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EN_180DO_180403_1_1&source=MH_EM_EN_180DO_180403_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_EN_180DO_180403_1_1")

name: Chris Van Hollen (via DSCC.org)
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
As DSCC chair, I want to thank you for stepping up to make sure we hit our critical FEC deadline in March.
---
[****](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20180403-VanHollen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Team,

As DSCC chair, I want to thank you for stepping up to make sure we hit our goals before the critical end-of March FEC deadline.

Supporters like you are already helping Democrats score big upset victories -- and I know that with your continued engagement, there is no limit to what we can achieve together.

Last month, we saw Democrat Connor Lamb overcome a deluge of money from the Koch brothers and other secretive right-wing groups to win a massive upset in Pennsylvania.

In a district that voted for Trump by over 20 points, voters chose common decency and integrity over divisive rhetoric and partisan politics.

We saw a similar victory in the Senate race in Alabama in December when Democrat Doug Jones won a state that Trump carried by 28 points.

These victories are possible because Americans are rallying friends and neighbors to defend our values and get to the ballot box.

If supporters like you continue to show up on behalf of Democrats, contributing your time, your donations, and your enthusiasm, then I know we can take on GOP donors like the Koch brothers. Right-wing super PACS want to buy our elections so they can rig government to serve their big money agenda -- it's up to all of us to stop them.

So let's keep up the energy! With you on our side, we will keep fighting to ensure that we are a country where every individual can live with dignity and respect.

Thank you,

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator and DSCC Chair

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Jenn Thomas
subject: Can you make it to your local organizing meeting in the coming week?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Hello,
**We are organizing now to make sure we elect Democrats up and down the ballot in November's election.** There are local organizing meetings near you in the coming week. **Can you join us?**
**Bristol and Warren: Saturday (4/7)** from **11:30am - 1:00pm,** at **Roger Williams University CAS Room 120** (1 Old Ferry Rd, Bristol, RI 02809)
**East Providence: Tuesday (4/10)** from **6:00pm - 7:30pm,** at **Weaver Library** (41 Grove Ave, East Providence, RI 02914)
**Providence: Tuesday (4/10)** from **6:00pm - 7:30pm,** at **the Campaign Headquarters** (909 N Main St Providence, RI 02904)
**Barrington: Tuesday (4/10)** from **7:00pm - 8:30pm,** at **Barrington Senior Center** (281 County Rd, Barrington, RI 02806)
**Central Falls and Pawtucket: Wednesday (4/11)** from **7:00pm - 8:30pm,** at **Pawtucket Public Library** (13 Summer St, Pawtucket, RI 02860)
We've seen what can happen when voters are not engaged and invested in the outcome of an important election. **It's imperative that we get organized NOW to protect all our progress and our values in Rhode Island in this year's election.**
Thank you,
Jenn Thomas
Field Director
**PS:[You can see the full list of organizing meetings here!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a081/5e076a9e/54727816/144273b2/2407484420/VEsH/ "http://action.whitehouseforsenate.com/page/s/localorganizingmeetings")**

| Hi there,

We're reaching out together to say **thank you** for supporting the Florida Democrats in our push to hit our first quarterly Federal Election Commission deadline of 2018 -- thanks to supporters like you, we hit our goal!

With only minutes to spare, we beat the deadline and secured funding to keep our grassroots movement to turn Florida blue going.

We are both so proud of the accomplishments that Florida Democrats have made while fighting back against Trump, but we've got a lot more work left to do.

Next week, Rick Scott is set to make a big announcement -- and we all know what he's got in mind. He's ready to be Trump's newest lackey in the Senate.

In our critical fight to defeat Rick Scott and to keep winning special elections up and down the ballot, we're grateful to have your dedicated support.

Thanks from all of us here at the Florida Dems HQ.

-Terrie Rizzo and Juan Peñalosa
